2008.issue: [S2008] Version 1.0.2 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

3027.issue: [W3027] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": testing for OS windows, macos is missing in job "adapter-tests". Add corresponding tests to "test-and-release.yml" or adapt [package.json](https://github.com/MyHomeMyData/ioBroker.e3oncan/blob/master/package.json) "os" accordingly.

3031.issue: [S3031] [package.json](https://github.com/MyHomeMyData/ioBroker.e3oncan/blob/master/package.json) "os" excludes required OS systems (windows, macos). Please verify whether adapter support can be extended.

3032.issue: [S3032] No workflow run for "test-and-release.yml" triggered by tag "v1.0.2" was found for current release 1.0.2. Workflow logs might be deleted already.

5060.issue: [W5060] Package "Buffer" is listed in dependencies of [package.json](https://github.com/MyHomeMyData/ioBroker.e3oncan/blob/master/package.json) but not imported or required by any scanned source file. Dependency might be unused.

5063.issue: [W5063] JSON formatting in "admin/jsonConfig.json" is hard to read (inconsistent indentation). Please use consistent indentation and proper line breaks.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5604.issue: [W5604] i18n "admin/i18n" language "zh-cn" is missing 2 key(s) present in English: Check, if this adapter shall be used., Device name in object tree. Must not contain dots.

5605.issue: [W5605] i18n "admin/i18n" language "zh-cn" has 4 outdated key(s) not present in English: Device format configuration, Listen for data on addresses given in this table. No writing to CAN bus., Listen for data on addresses given in this table. No writing to CAN bus. Press '+' to begin., Scan will take up to 5 minutes. Plaese make sure, no other UDSonCAN client (e.g. Open3Eclient.py) is running. Please do not close the tab during scan. You may follow up the progress by watching the Log in an additional tab.

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/tabUdsDevices/items/tableUdsDevices/items[1]" attribute "tooltip" uses key "Device name in object tree. Must not contain dots." which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

6028.issue: [W6028] Changelog entry header(s) do not match required version format "x.y.z": Older versions

0036.issue: [E0036] @alcalzone/release-script 5.2.0 specified. 5.2.1 is required as minimum,  5.2.1 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/MyHomeMyData/ioBroker.e3oncan/blob/master/package.json)

0034.issue: [W0034] @iobroker/adapter-core 3.3.2 specified. 3.4.1 (or newer) is current. Please update dependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/MyHomeMyData/ioBroker.e3oncan/blob/master/package.json)

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.7.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/MyHomeMyData/ioBroker.e3oncan/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.

0069.issue: [W0069] The following dependencies require a node.js version incompatible with the adapter's minimum (node 22.0.0): abbrev (requires node: "^20.17.0 || >=22.9.0"), node-gyp (requires node: "^20.17.0 || >=22.9.0"), node-gyp > which (requires node: "^20.17.0 || >=22.9.0"), nopt (requires node: "^20.17.0 || >=22.9.0"), proc-log (requires node: "^20.17.0 || >=22.9.0"). Please increase the engines.node requirement at [package.json](https://github.com/MyHomeMyData/ioBroker.e3oncan/blob/master/package.json) or update/replace the incompatible dependencies.
